headlines.headline: Frelol Software completes planned facility upgrade in Scandinavia

headlines.headline: Frelol Software warns of supply chain disruptions affecting Scandinavia operations

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
